C1.note: System correctly identified and prepared: PDB 1KF1, intramolecular parallel propeller G4, seq d[AGGG(TTAGGG)3]. 3 crystallographic channel K+ explicitly retained (PLAN.md L10-11, STUDY_REPORT 2.20). Preflight PASS (no chain breaks/missing/modified residues). Re-solvated, crystal waters stripped. Build completed: system/1kf1.prmtop, 20232 atoms, net charge 0 (build_full.out / STUDY_REPORT 2).

C2.note: FF justified via tier protocol with RAG validation: DNA.OL21 (Amber24 p.40, recommended DNA FF; PMID:36540025), OPC water (manual p.54: 'improves structural description of DNA G-quadruplex'), K+/Cl- Joung-Cheatham, ~150 mM KCl. PLAN.md FF table L28-32 cites lit precedent + manual page + per-study reason. No banned hardcoding phrases. Channel-K+ retention decision explicitly justified (addIons will not place ions in channel).

C3.note: Full protocol executed and completed: min1/min2/heat(NVT 0->300K)/equil(NPT Berendsen)/equil2(graded restraint release)/prod. Production ran full 100 ns = 50,000,000 steps at dt=0.002, 498 ns/day, 4.81h wall (prod.mdout Final Performance Info). prod.nc = 2.43 GB, 10000 frames. dt/SHAKE/PME/cutoff all standard for DNA explicit solvent.

C4.note: Observable-targeted analysis all present and verified against raw .dat: channel-K+ distance to O6 centroid (kchan_dist.dat: K1 1.89/K2 1.53 frame1, K3 leaves to ~23 A), inter-tetrad K+ localization (kchan_tetrad.dat), Hoogsteen H-bond occupancy per tetrad (hbavg_t1/2/3.dat: ~99% N1-H/N2-H, t2 N1-H...O6 91-92%), all-anti chi torsions (chi_torsions.dat), tetrad-core RMSD (mean 1.80 / max 2.64 A verified), full-DNA RMSD (2.31/3.28), Rg (11.84 A), RMSF, convergence check. Plots produced.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed (Parkinson et al. Nature 417:876, PMID:12050675: parallel propeller G4, K+ ions in channel between G-tetrads). Key Expected (parallel topology stable, K+ in channel between quartets, G-quartet H-bonds >90%, RMSD <2.5 A): agent reproduces all. Two structural channel K+ retained 100% at ~2 A from O6 centroid lodged between tetrads; all 12 G anti (parallel marker preserved); Hoogsteen H-bonds 91-99.5%; tetrad-core RMSD 1.80 A (<2.5). 0.5-occupancy terminal ion exits at ~60 ps, correctly interpreted as low-affinity outer site, not instability. Full conclusion-level agreement with paper-confirmed key.
